metadata.title: Payment Reminder Template | FlowDockr
metadata.description: A clear payment reminder structure for overdue freelance invoices.

hero.title: Payment Reminder Template
hero.description: Use this sequence to follow up professionally and increase payment response rate.

items.title: Invoice reference
items.description: Include amount, invoice number, and due date.

items.title: Direct payment request
items.description: Ask for payment confirmation with specific timeline.

items.title: Escalation note
items.description: State next step if payment is not received.

cta.title: Turn reminders into a repeatable workflow.
cta.description: Use Payment Protection to standardize your sequence.
